title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you run Llama 2, Code Llama, and other large language models locally on macOS and Linux.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, and pull models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package that wraps Ollama models for chains, agents, and retrieval.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-web/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI (like ChatGPT) that talks to a local Ollama instance; no data leaves your machine.

title: ollama-cli (mattw/ollama-cli)
summary: Interactive TUI for browsing, pulling, and chatting with Ollama models inside the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS-Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub-Copilot-like pair programmer.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama; supports streaming, embeddings, and custom options.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store + LangChain.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers questions using any Ollama model.

title: ollama.nvim
summary: Neovim plugin for generating code, docs, or commit messages via Ollama.

title: ollama-express
summary: Lightweight Express.js proxy that adds JWT auth and quotas in front of Ollama.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models for generative QA and summarization pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming and strongly-typed request/response models.

title: ollama-swift
summary: Swift Package Manager client for iOS/macOS apps wanting to talk to a local Ollama server.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module that spins up Ollama on EC2 with NVIDIA GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-dbee
summary: CLI SQL client that uses Ollama to translate natural language into SQL queries.
